build.buildCommand: npm --prefix server ci && npm --prefix server run prisma:generate && npm --prefix server run build

deploy.preDeployCommand: if [ "$RUN_DB_MIGRATIONS" = "1" ]; then if [ -z "$DIRECT_URL" ]; then echo 'Missing DIRECT_URL for prisma:migrate:deploy'; exit 1; fi; DATABASE_URL="$DIRECT_URL" npm --prefix server run prisma:migrate:deploy; else echo 'Skipping prisma migrations (set RUN_DB_MIGRATIONS=1 to enable)'; fi
